free_text: Scattering of 19.5 MeV alpha-particles by Cu-63, Ni-64,
The targets were self-supporting foils, the isotopic
enrichments were better than 99.5%, the thicknesses
ranged from 1.06 mg/cm**2 for Cu-63 to 1.25 mg/cm**2
2 mm*5 mm ,placed at 10.5 cm from the target.
a fixed angle was used as a monitor.
The errors in the measured cross sections due
to statistics and uncertainties in the target
thickness, geometry, target impurities and beam
integration do not exceed 15%, except the inelastic
scattering angular distribution to Cu-65 has larger
SD: SF3=EL -> INL in REACTION code.
